caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a blue baseball cap with an emblem, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a watch with a blue face. In front of him is a professional microphone on a stand. He is gesturing with his hands as he speaks, moving from open-palmed motions to bringing his hands closer together. To his left, a white wall features a logo with five stars and the words "GRIND HUSTLE" repeated vertically. To his right, a background element displays a large red "BOSS" and "KID" logo. Overlaid on the scene are graphics for "BOSS TALK 101" and a circular logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." The man remains centered throughout the sequence, his facial expression shifting slightly as he continues his conversation.
